rationale: No direct conflict. §31.0211 governs the instructional materials and technology allotment funded from a dedicated state fund on a per-student basis. It does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax values.
quote: A school district is entitled to an allotment each biennium from the state instructional materials and technology fund for each student enrolled in the district
_note: The proposed homestead exemption increase would indirectly affect school district property tax revenue, but §31.0211's allotment is state-funded and per-student, with no statutory link to local property values or homestead exemption amounts.
